stemHtml: Some aircraft have maximum speeds for the deployment of speed brakes to…

options.a: Prevent longitudinal pitch instability at high speeds caused by speed brake operation.
options.b: Avoid the roll control from being compromised by turbulence from the speed brakes.
options.c: Ensure that fuel economy is maximised by reducing drag at high speeds.
options.d: Prevent damage to the speed brakes due to excessive aerodynamic forces.
